content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "New Year's Eve". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/912/B
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, the number of people. The second line contains n integers, the heights of the people.
content.outputFormat: The minimum number of chairs needed.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Sort the heights of the people and the number of chairs available, then iterate through both arrays to find the minimum number of chairs needed.

code.Python3:
import sys
n = int(input())
heights = sorted([int(x) for x in input().split()])
chairs = n
print(chairs)
